transcript.text: I don't think we had any requests there, right, Nika?
Yeah, one is about publishing, but a week and a half didn't pass.
H1 and MetaTitle are the same.
So when the publishing happens, the criterias are not interchangeable.
The second one is about the PSEO pipelines.
And I think a week has already passed, so we can, from Monday, we can just follow them up and ask to handle this.
And yeah, that's it, I guess.

Mara, so for context, you know, the pseudo, whatever, SEO articles we were doing, the request that Nika put in was basically to create individual pipelines for each of those articles based on templates that we just click and it goes.
Given the, I'm wondering, is this, should we push them to do this?
Because, you know, given that the SSL might change the analysis.
And also thanks for giving me the context.
I would say there are other, there are other priorities probably that they should focus on in the meantime.
If like, and it's not like we're waiting that long.
Early next week, we might hear that things are shifting drastically.
So I would say that's when we can probably just like leave.
And then hopefully we get some clarity at the beginning of next week and we can go from there.
So Nika, I'd say like maybe follow up on it next.
Feel free, Nika, to tag Vivek or I and ask also if we have an update, you know, before you feel like you have to go bump it to next week.
I don't believe there was anything for Galileo.
Vivek, you follow up on Tuesday.
I have opened the publishing ticket for Sivanan, so I will do that.
That's going to get done for this week.
Zan, this is the big one.
I think there were, well, there was only one, but there's a bunch of things, right?
Yeah, I'm just running the flow for this.
I think Markus is very close.
We have some small details left.
I saw that he added the part for data wrapper IDs, and I'm waiting for a third flow to finish.
So I'll have a better context on this.
But I think that we are very close.
I think we should open the separate...
Sorry, the follow-up request as well.
It's a separate linear request for the alternatives and for the version stages.
And why is he missing so many little details?
I remember when you were off, I gave him the document, the template.
Even then, he's missing a lot of little things.
Like, do you know why he's missing it?
Or any way to prevent that?
The miss was about the CMS categories, and it is always adding up.
So when we mapped, we had a different scenario, and now it's a different scenario.
The same thing was with data reprities, so it's a big different issue.
All right, so yeah, for those follow-up requests, I think you'll need to maybe record a couple more videos or something.
Yeah, basically to explain how the vendor versus pages publishing work and alternatives.

Yeah, and just make sure you highlight the dependency there, like, you know, which order it needs to go, like, the versus comes first and the alternatives, so that he doesn't start working on the alternatives before.
There was this one which I wanted to get in, which was the inline images, similar to what we have in Strapi, but I don't think it's urgent, so I didn't find it.
We have Shrappy, think we had a couple, right, over here?

Okay, we had the staging automation request, and I don't know, we submitted that like three weeks ago, and you told me to follow up on Wednesday, and I did follow up on Wednesday, talking about how urgent it was, because Kirkland was asking, he said they didn't include it in the sprints, and he was asking how important it was to us, or whether it was like a nice to have, and I told him it wasn't, but I'm not written anything on that front yet, and which other ones we have open, okay, the medium redistribution.
just going back to the publishing, looking at the comments, you mentioned the locking, the API key, reached out the Strap key, did you reach out the Strap key, the API key?
I think you can ping Paul and CEO for that.
So just create like a new thread and you can just ping them.
For the medium one, Marcos has been on it since like last week and I followed up again this week, but nothing again.
So I don't know how many times I can't follow up.
Yeah, they have it in one of their cycles.
So I think we may see it like, yeah, it says seven weekdays left.
They have it in their sprint.
But yeah, just make sure you check the linear ticket itself because the status says over there, like, you know, whether they've moved it into the.
I know you followed up on that.
So Marcus is looking at that now, right?
Then the image redesign, I've been following up.
I think they needed like a Figma, whatever, guideline or something.
So I've checked with Guzar and Victor.
So the only open item there is, yeah, let's just get that API key publishing.
I don't think we have any more accounts, right?
Quick, quick addition to our ramp.
And I think that the flow has...
I'm going to tell it to Markus as well.
So it was supposed to be in draft, right?
Yeah, yeah, yeah, and it was published automatically, so I'm going to fix that.
I can follow up with that.
Nika, I know you have that one draft that will come in.
Yeah, it needs internal linking, yeah.
Miles, this is an update I couldn't get to the RAM editorials, two of them, so I'll try to maybe do three next week or something.
Yeah, I think, I imagine that will be just fine.
Yeah, we kind of mentioned it either in the post-all update, so I just, you know, slide it in there.
OK, that was pretty much it.
Just a reminder, again, you guys.
Like, just make sure you, you know, follow all processes, et cetera.
If there's something that's happening or just ask me.
So, yeah, that's pretty much it from my end.

But, yeah, if any, like, if you're facing any continual blockers or you feel like linear tickets aren't getting the response that you need them to, as always, feel free to ping me in the channel and I can help escalate it also and just make sure that it becomes a priority for the engineering sprints.
But, yeah, this has been great.
Do you guys have anything to bring up or?
Well, I hope you guys have a great weekend.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly catch-up to discuss ongoing projects, updates, and blockers across various platforms and tools used by the GrowthX Labs team.](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiple platforms (DataGrid, Galileo, Zan, Papid, Strapi) discussed; various tasks in different stages of completion](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Publishing automation and API key issues need immediate attention](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Team encouraged to follow processes and escalate blockers when necessary](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Topics

### DataGrid Updates

  - [Publishing criteria not interchangeable; H1 and MetaTitle remain the same](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [PSEO pipelines: Follow-up planned for Monday, but deprioritized due to potential SSL changes](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Internal fixes implemented](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

### Galileo and Publishing Automation

  - [No urgent Galileo tasks](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Vivek to follow up on publishing automation ticket with Sivanan this week](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

### Zan Development Progress

  - [Markus close to completion; small details remaining (e.g., data wrapper IDs)](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Separate Linear requests needed for alternatives and version stages](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Video explanations required for vendor vs. pages publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)

### Papid and Strapi Requests

  - [Inline images feature for Papid planned for next week](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Strapi staging automation request pending (3 weeks old); importance communicated](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Medium redistribution task assigned to Marcos, follow-up needed](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Code formatting being addressed by Marcus](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Image redesign awaiting Figma guidelines from Guzar and Victor](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### API Key and Publishing Issues

  - [Oluwatimilehin to reach out to Paul and CEO for Strapi API key](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Nika discovered automatic publishing instead of draft status; Markus to be notified](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

### Content and Editorial Updates

  - [Vivek behind on RAM editorials; plans to catch up next week](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Nika working on a draft requiring internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nika: Follow up on PSEO pipelines next week (not urgent)](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

  - [Oluwatimilehin: Continue following up on Medium redistribution task](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Vivek: Check with Guzar and Victor on Figma guidelines for image redesign](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Nika: Address automatic publishing issue with Markus](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Vivek: Catch up on RAM editorials next week](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Team: Escalate blockers to Mara if Linear tickets aren't getting necessary responses](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

action_items.description: Follow up on publishing automation ticket for Sivanan
